limitation: Proxy labels are NOT legal Brady determinations. They are algorithmic heuristics based on allegation type + investigative finding.

label_rules.tier_1_strong_giglio: Falsification or Criminal allegation WITH sustained finding
label_rules.tier_3_brady_adjacent: Physical Abuse or Civil Rights with sustained finding

recommended_metrics.primary: Recall at tier >= 1 (must find all strong Giglio material)
recommended_metrics.secondary: Recall at tier >= 2 (should find most impeachment-relevant material)
recommended_metrics.tertiary: Precision at tier >= 2 (how much noise in the flagged set)
